panels.title: Request Throughput (req/s, last 5m)
panels.description: Average incoming server request rate over the last 5 minutes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(sum(Count) / 300.0, 3) AS req_per_sec FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

panels.title: P95 Latency (last 15m)
panels.description: 95th percentile end-to-end span latency from trace durations in the last 15 minutes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

panels.title: 5xx Error Rate (last 15m)
panels.description: Percentage of HTTP requests resulting in server errors (status >= 500).

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) >= 500) / greatest(sum(Count), 1), 3) AS error_rate_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

panels.title: Availability (last 15m)
panels.description: Approximate availability computed as 100% minus the 5xx error rate.

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 - (100.0 * sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) >= 500) / greatest(sum(Count), 1)), 3) AS availability_pct FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE

panels.title: Requests by Status Class (per minute)
panels.description: Per-minute request volume split by HTTP status class (2xx/3xx/4xx/5xx).

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) BETWEEN 200 AND 299) AS s2xx, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) BETWEEN 300 AND 399) AS s3xx, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) BETWEEN 400 AND 499) AS s4xx, sumIf(Count, toInt32OrNull(coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.response.status_code'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.status_code'], ''), '0')) >= 500) AS s5xx FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Latency Trend (avg and p95, per minute)
panels.description: Average and P95 latency trends over time using trace durations.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(Timestamp) AS time, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: HTTP Method Mix (last 1h)
panels.description: Distribution of request volume by HTTP method in the last hour.

targets.rawSql: WITH reqs AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.request.method'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.method'], ''), 'OTHER') AS m, Count FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) SELECT sumIf(Count, m = 'GET') AS GET, sumIf(Count, m = 'POST') AS POST, sumIf(Count, m = 'PUT') AS PUT, sumIf(Count, m = 'DELETE') AS DELETE, sumIf(Count, m NOT IN ('GET', 'POST', 'PUT', 'DELETE')) AS OTHER FROM reqs

panels.title: Top Endpoints by Volume (last 1h)
panels.description: Most requested endpoints with request count, latency stats, and error span count.

targets.rawSql: SELECT SpanAttributes['http.method'] AS method, coalesce(nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.route'], ''), nullIf(SpanAttributes['http.target'], ''), 'unknown') AS route, count() AS requests, round(avg(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS avg_ms, round(quantile(0.95)(Duration) / 1e6, 2) AS p95_ms, countIf(StatusCode = 'Error') AS errors FROM otel.otel_traces WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND SpanAttributes['http.method'] != '' GROUP BY method, route HAVING route != 'unknown' ORDER BY requests DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Top 4xx Paths (last 1h)
panels.description: Client-error hotspots: paths producing the most 4xx responses.

targets.rawSql: SELECT JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['req'], 'method') AS method, JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['req'], 'url') AS path, count() AS hits, formatDateTime(max(Timestamp), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS last_seen FROM otel.otel_logs WHERE Timestamp >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR AND toInt32OrNull(JSONExtractString(LogAttributes['res'], 'statusCode')) BETWEEN 400 AND 499 GROUP BY method, path ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Unmapped Route Share (last 1h)
panels.description: Percent of requests where route label is missing and grouped as unknown.

targets.rawSql: WITH reqs AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(Attributes['http.route'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['url.path'], ''), nullIf(Attributes['http.target'], ''), 'unknown') AS route, Count FROM otel.otel_metrics_histogram WHERE MetricName IN ('http.server.request.duration', 'http.server.duration') AND TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) SELECT round(100.0 * sumIf(Count, route = 'unknown') / greatest(sum(Count), 1), 3) AS unknown_route_pct FROM reqs

panels.title: Top Sum Metrics (otel_metrics_sum, last 1h)
panels.description: Most active sum-type metrics with totals and sample density over the last hour.

targets.rawSql: SELECT MetricName AS metric, sum(Value) AS total_value, count() AS points, any(MetricUnit) AS unit FROM otel.otel_metrics_sum WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY metric ORDER BY points DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Gauge Samples per Minute (otel_metrics_gauge)
panels.description: Ingestion cadence for gauge metrics, useful for heartbeat and sampling health checks.

targets.rawSql: SELECT toStartOfMinute(TimeUnix) AS time, count() AS gauge_points FROM otel.otel_metrics_gauge WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Exponential Histogram Coverage (last 1h)
panels.description: Coverage view of exponential histogram metrics including sample counts and value ranges.

targets.rawSql: SELECT MetricName AS metric, sum(Count) AS samples, round(avg(Min), 4) AS avg_min, round(avg(Max), 4) AS avg_max, any(MetricUnit) AS unit FROM otel.otel_metrics_exponential_histogram WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR GROUP BY metric ORDER BY samples DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Summary Quantiles Snapshot (otel_metrics_summary)
panels.description: Quantile snapshots from summary metrics (array-joined quantile/value pairs).

targets.rawSql: SELECT MetricName AS metric, round(quantile, 3) AS quantile, round(avg(value), 4) AS avg_value, any(MetricUnit) AS unit FROM (SELECT MetricName, MetricUnit, arrayJoin(ValueAtQuantiles.Quantile) AS quantile, arrayJoin(ValueAtQuantiles.Value) AS value, TimeUnix FROM otel.otel_metrics_summary WHERE TimeUnix >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) GROUP BY metric, quantile ORDER BY metric ASC, quantile ASC LIMIT 100

panels.title: Trace Lookup Entries (trace_id_ts, last 1h)
panels.description: Number of trace-id index records seen in the base lookup table for recent traces.

targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS trace_ids FROM otel.otel_traces_trace_id_ts WHERE End >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR

panels.title: Trace Lookup MV Sync % (last 1h)
panels.description: Checks materialized-view coverage vs base trace-id table for recent traces.

targets.rawSql: WITH base AS (SELECT count() AS c FROM otel.otel_traces_trace_id_ts WHERE End >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR), mv AS (SELECT count() AS c FROM otel.otel_traces_trace_id_ts_mv WHERE End >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR) SELECT round(100.0 * mv.c / greatest(base.c, 1), 2) AS mv_sync_pct FROM base, mv
